hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
SELECT billingTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplateToFeeType_Seq id, billingTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq billingTemplateId, billingTemplate.Created_By_Seq createdBy, billingTemplate.Modified_Dt modifiedDate, billingTemplate.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, billingTemplate.Record_Version recordVersion, billingTemplate.ROI_FeeType_Seq feeTypeId
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorTypeToBillingTemplate typeToTemplate, cabinet..ROI_BillingTemplateToFeeType billingTemplate
WHERE billingTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq = typeToTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq AND typeToTemplate.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = :requestorTypeId
